steps.title: Identify what word the context requires
steps.content: The lab includes engineers, biologists, chemists, and physicists, and its research uses insights and techniques from all those fields. De La Cruz's work therefore crosses into multiple disciplines rather than staying within one. The blank needs a word meaning "going beyond" or "crossing" traditional disciplinary limits.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'epitomizing': "Epitomizing traditional boundaries" means perfectly exemplifying those boundaries — implying the work keeps disciplines separate, the opposite of what the text describes. ✗
  • Choice B — 'transcending': "Transcending" means going beyond or surpassing limits — exactly what De La Cruz's cross-disciplinary research does. ✓
  • Choice C — 'anticipating': "Anticipating traditional boundaries" means expecting or predicting them, which does not convey the idea of crossing or using multiple disciplines. ✗
  • Choice D — 'reinforcing': "Reinforcing traditional boundaries" means strengthening the separation between disciplines — the opposite of what the text describes. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
